Abdoulaye Seck.note: Senegal's physical centre-back option, useful for clearing crosses and attacking dead balls.
Abdoulaye Seck.noteZh: 阿卜杜拉耶·塞克是塞内加尔身体型中卫选择，适合解围传中并冲击定位球。

Antoine Mendy.note: Senegal's right-side defensive cover, able to defend wide or tuck inside when the shape changes.
Antoine Mendy.noteZh: 安托万·门迪是塞内加尔右侧防守保障，阵型变化时能守边路，也能内收到中路。

Assane Diao.note: Senegal's direct wide runner, dangerous when space opens and he can attack at speed.
Assane Diao.noteZh: 阿萨内·迪奥是塞内加尔直接型边路跑动点，空间打开并能提速冲击时很危险。

Bamba Dieng.note: Senegal's lively forward option, useful for chasing centre-backs and snapping at loose chances.
Bamba Dieng.noteZh: 班巴·迪昂是塞内加尔活跃的前锋选择，适合追压中卫并抓住松散机会。

Bara Sapoko Ndiaye.summary: Bara Sapoko Ndiaye is a Senegal central midfielder from Bayern Munich who gives the national team youthful ball carrying, midfield mobility, and long-term upside.
Bara Sapoko Ndiaye.note: Senegal's teenage midfield wildcard, useful for fresh legs and brave carries through pressure.
Bara Sapoko Ndiaye.noteZh: 巴拉·萨波科·恩迪亚耶是塞内加尔青少年中场变招，适合带来新鲜腿脚并勇敢带球穿过压力。

Cherif Ndiaye.note: Senegal's penalty-box forward, useful for holding off defenders and finishing service from wide areas.
Cherif Ndiaye.noteZh: 谢里夫·恩迪亚耶是塞内加尔禁区前锋，适合抗住防守者并终结来自边路的传球。

Edouard Mendy.note: Senegal's experienced goalkeeper, trusted for box command and calming long defensive stretches.
Edouard Mendy.noteZh: 爱德华·门迪是塞内加尔经验丰富的门将，禁区指挥和稳定漫长防守阶段都值得信任。

El Hadji Malick Diouf.note: Senegal's explosive left-sided runner, able to turn a recovery into a quick attack down the flank.
El Hadji Malick Diouf.noteZh: 埃尔·哈吉·马利克·迪乌夫是塞内加尔爆发型左路跑动点，能把一次回追变成边路快速进攻。

Habib Diarra.note: Senegal's powerful midfield carrier, useful for driving through contact and joining the attack late.
Habib Diarra.noteZh: 哈比卜·迪亚拉是塞内加尔力量型中场推进者，适合带球穿过对抗并后插上参与进攻。

Ibrahim Mbaye.note: Senegal's teenage wide spark, dangerous when he can isolate a defender and run directly at goal.
Ibrahim Mbaye.noteZh: 易卜拉欣·姆巴耶是塞内加尔青少年边路火花，能一对一面对防守者并直接冲向球门时很危险。

Idrissa Gueye.note: Senegal's veteran midfield reader, still valuable for sensing danger and stopping counters early.
Idrissa Gueye.noteZh: 伊德里萨·盖耶是塞内加尔老将中场阅读者，依然能提前感知危险并尽早阻断反击。

Iliman Ndiaye.note: Senegal's clever attacking connector, able to receive in traffic and slip into the box with short touches.
Iliman Ndiaye.noteZh: 伊利曼·恩迪亚耶是塞内加尔聪明的进攻连接点，能在人群中接球并用小范围触球钻入禁区。

Ismail Jakobs.note: Senegal's left-back runner, useful for overlaps and fast recovery against switches.
Ismail Jakobs.noteZh: 伊斯梅尔·雅各布斯是塞内加尔左后卫跑动点，适合套边并快速回追应对转移球。

Ismaila Sarr.note: Senegal's vertical winger, dangerous when he can run beyond the full-back before the defense resets.
Ismaila Sarr.noteZh: 伊斯梅拉·萨尔是塞内加尔纵向边锋，能在防线重整前冲到边后卫身后时很危险。

Kalidou Koulibaly.note: Senegal's defensive leader, still the voice and physical anchor of the back line.
Kalidou Koulibaly.noteZh: 卡利杜·库利巴利是塞内加尔防守领袖，仍然是后防线的声音和身体支柱。

Krepin Diatta.note: Senegal's tireless right-side runner, useful for shuttling between defense and attack.
Krepin Diatta.noteZh: 克雷潘·迪亚塔是塞内加尔不知疲倦的右路跑动点，适合在防守和进攻之间来回穿梭。

Lamine Camara.note: Senegal's young midfield passer, able to progress play and threaten from restarts or distance.
Lamine Camara.noteZh: 拉明·卡马拉是塞内加尔年轻中场传球手，能推进进攻，并在定位球或远射中制造威胁。

Mamadou Sarr.note: Senegal's young centre-back option, useful for recovery defending and growing into physical duels.
Mamadou Sarr.noteZh: 马马杜·萨尔是塞内加尔年轻中卫选择，适合回追防守，并逐渐适应身体对抗。

Mory Diaw.note: Senegal's goalkeeper depth, bringing reach and shot-stopping cover behind the senior options.
Mory Diaw.noteZh: 莫里·迪奥是塞内加尔门将深度，在资深选择身后提供覆盖范围和扑救保障。

Moussa Niakhate.note: Senegal's left-footed defensive balance, useful for covering channels and passing out cleanly.
Moussa Niakhate.noteZh: 穆萨·尼亚哈特是塞内加尔左脚防守平衡点，适合覆盖通道并干净出球。

Nicolas Jackson.note: Senegal's restless striker, dangerous when he stretches centre-backs and attacks loose balls.
Nicolas Jackson.noteZh: 尼古拉斯·杰克逊是塞内加尔活跃中锋，拉扯中卫并冲击松散球时很危险。

Pape Gueye.note: Senegal's big midfield screen, useful for winning contact and feeding the next pass forward.
Pape Gueye.noteZh: 帕普·盖耶是塞内加尔高大中场屏障，适合赢下对抗并向前送出下一脚传球。

Pape Matar Sarr.note: Senegal's box-to-box engine, able to carry through pressure and arrive beyond the first wave.
Pape Matar Sarr.noteZh: 帕普·马塔尔·萨尔是塞内加尔双向发动机，能带球穿过压力并在第一波进攻后继续前插。

Pathe Ciss.note: Senegal's midfield battler, useful for second balls and keeping possession moving after contact.
Pathe Ciss.noteZh: 帕特·西斯是塞内加尔中场斗士，适合争抢第二落点并在对抗后让控球继续流动。

Sadio Mane.note: Senegal's attacking reference point, still valuable for movement, timing, and decisive box touches.
Sadio Mane.noteZh: 萨迪奥·马内是塞内加尔进攻参照点，在跑动、时机和禁区关键触球上依然很有价值。

Yehvann Diouf.note: Senegal's athletic goalkeeper option, useful for reaction saves and confident penalty-area work.
Yehvann Diouf.noteZh: 耶万·迪乌夫是塞内加尔运动能力强的门将选择，适合反应扑救和自信处理禁区事务。
